title: Datadog Q4 2025 Earnings Preview: Results, Analyst Targets & Stock Forecast
text: Datadog Q4 2025 Earnings Preview and Analyst Outlook. Expected Performance: Analysts expect Datadog's revenue to grow 24.5 percent year on year to 918.2 million with adjusted earnings of 0.55 per share. Recent Track Record: The company demonstrated strong performance in Q3 delivering revenues of 885.7 million up 28.4 percent year on year. Datadog has beat revenue estimates every single time over the past two years by 3.6 percent on average suggesting consistent outperformance. Enterprise Customer Growth: The platform added 210 enterprise customers with annual contracts exceeding 100,000 reaching a cumulative total of 4,060 such customers. Market Conditions: Uncertainty surrounding trade policies and corporate tax changes presents potential headwinds. Software development stocks have declined on average over the previous month. Analyst Consensus: Overall analyst sentiment remains optimistic with a consensus view that the company will continue to deliver strong results. Valuation: The stock trades substantially below the average analyst price target indicating potential upside opportunity.
